gestures.mdmPrompt: the tutor steps forward, smiling broadly, while raising both hands to create excitement about learning measurement
the tutor tilts slightly to the right, extending the right arm to point at imaginary rulers in the air, engaging the students
the tutor stands tall, spreads both arms wide while explaining the size of a foot as it relates to big shoes
the tutor shifts weight to one side, raises the left hand with fingers extended to count feet aloud while maintaining eye contact
the tutor takes a step forward with eagerness, gestures with both hands to encourage participation in measuring together
the tutor leans slightly forward, extending the right hand to gesture counting feet while prompting students to find an object
the tutor stands confidently, raises both arms slightly while nodding to commend students on learning about feet in measurement
the tutor leans forward slightly, lowering the right hand, while raising the left hand to highlight the importance of feet in measuring lengths
